The Acetosella genus is closely related to the Oxalis genus, sharing many similarities in their leaf structure and flower patterns. The classification of Acetosella yapacaniensis is still a subject of ongoing research in the field of botany. More studies are needed to confirm its exact position within the plant kingdom.
